case_title: ROSANNA INCHINGALO VS. JESSICA BAUTISTA ROCHA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-06-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-06-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ROSANNA INCHINGALO. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JESSICA BAUTISTA WITH SELF PROVIDED SPANISH TRANSLATOR DIANA ROMERO. DEFENDANT REQUESTS TO CORRECT HER NAME ON COMPLAINT FROM JESSICA BAUTISTA ROCHA TO JESSICA BAUTISTA (HERNANDEZ). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-06-2017 - JUDGMENT.
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS FILED BY PLAINTIFF INCHINGALO, ROSANNA AS TO DEFENDANT BAUTISTA, JESSICA AKA JESSICA BAUTISTA HERNANDEZ
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,300.00 FILED BY INCHINGALO, ROSANNA AS TO DEFENDANT BAUTISTA, JESSICA AKA JESSICA BAUTISTA HERNANDEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-06-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 SERVED DEC-07-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BAUTISTA, JESSICA AKA JESSICA BAUTISTA HERNANDEZ
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF INCHINGALO, ROSANNA AS TO DEFENDANT BAUTISTA, JESSICA AKA JESSICA BAUTISTA HERNANDEZ
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF CHANGNING ADDRESS FROM: PO BOX #410028 SAN FRANCISCO, CA TO: 350 TURK ST. #303 SAN FRANCISCO, CA FILED BY PLAINTIFF INCHINGALO, ROSANNA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF INCHINGALO, ROSANNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAUTISTA, JESSICA AKA JESSICA BAUTISTA HERNANDEZ $120.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $190.00, PARTIES AGREE THAT THE COMPLAINT SHOULD STATE THE DEFENDANT'S NAME AS "JESSICA BAUTISTA" AND THAT DEFENDANT'S NAME DOES NOT INCLUDE "ROCHA." STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
